plugins.name: distinction-backend-agent
plugins.description: Careful senior-backend-engineer workflow for the saflearn-api repository: analyze, plan, get approval, implement, test, physically test endpoints, PR-review, and commit/push only after approval.

plugins.name: distinction-bytes-agent
plugins.description: Full-product engineering workflow for the Distinction Bytes ecosystem across the mobile app (distinction-bytes), backend API (saflearn-api), and AI service (bytecore). Covers PRD-driven feature work, cross-repo contract tracing, end-to-end delivery, integration debugging, and validation.
